title: cyathea pallescens
intro: Cyathea pallescens, also known as the pale tree fern, is a species of fern native to New Zealand. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, where its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Cyathea pallescens is said to provide various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving immune function. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas and infusions, and is also used in traditional New Zealand bush medicines.
